mapper.select: SELECT b.*, u.real_name as admin_name FROM building b LEFT JOIN user u ON b.admin_id = u.id ORDER BY b.id DESC
SELECT b.*, u.real_name as admin_name FROM building b LEFT JOIN user u ON b.admin_id = u.id ORDER BY b.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM building
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
SELECT b.*, u.real_name as admin_name FROM building b LEFT JOIN user u ON b.admin_id = u.id WHERE b.id = #{id}
SELECT u.id, u.real_name as admin_name FROM user u WHERE u.role = 'DORM_ADMIN' AND u.status = 1 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM building b WHERE b.admin_id = u.id )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO building (name, address, floors, admin_id, description) VALUES (#{name}, #{address}, #{floors}, #{adminId}, #{description})
